title: Rep. Moskowitz Demands Two Separate Congressional Hearings After Pentagon Stalls
detail: Rep. Jared Moskowitz (D-FL) called for two separate congressional hearings in response to the Pentagon's failure to deliver the 46 classified UAP videos demanded by Rep. Luna: one focused on the video non-disclosure itself, and a second on missing and deceased scientists connected to U.S. nuclear programs. Moskowitz stated that colleagues with White House contacts 'feel encouraged that a UAP release is coming, but that the Pentagon will find every excuse to avoid delivering more information.' War Department spokesperson Susan Gough said only that the Department would respond directly to Luna's letter — no videos or timeline were provided. The dual-hearing demand marked a significant escalation, with bipartisan congressional frustration at the Pentagon's stonewalling now on the public record.
confidenceReason: Moskowitz's hearing demands are on the public record; Pentagon non-response confirmed

media.caption: Congressional pressure on Pentagon UAP video disclosure escalates
